sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n57416" key="*kimw/nios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Κῐμώνιος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n57416.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">belonging to Cimon</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐν τοῖς</foreign> K. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐρειπίοις</foreign> among the ruins of his edifices, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0434.tlg001:151" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cratin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">151</biblScope></bibl>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κίμωσις</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κήμωσις</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
